claude-code-flow.name: ui-token-extractor-v2
claude-code-flow.description: Complete design system extractor: tokens, components, accessibility, multi-format output

files.content:
/**
 * Comprehensive prompt for extracting design tokens from UI screenshots
 */
export const TOKEN_EXTRACTION_PROMPT = `
You are a design systems expert analyzing a UI screenshot.

## Task
Extract ALL design tokens using this precise naming scheme:

### PRIMITIVE TOKENS (Exact values from the design)

**Colors** - Extract hex values:
\`\`\`
color.primitive.green.500 → #4CAF50
color.primitive.green.600 → #2ECC71
color.primitive.gray.50 → #F9FAFB
color.primitive.gray.900 → #1A1A1A
\`\`\`

**Typography** - Extract sizes and weights:
\`\`\`
typography.size.heading.xl → 28px
typography.size.heading.lg → 24px
typography.size.body.md → 16px
typography.weight.bold → 700
typography.weight.semibold → 600
typography.weight.regular → 400
\`\`\`

**Spacing** - Measure padding, margins, gaps:
\`\`\`
spacing.primitive.4 → 4px
spacing.primitive.8 → 8px
spacing.primitive.16 → 16px
spacing.primitive.24 → 24px
\`\`\`

**Layout**:
\`\`\`
radius.primitive.8 → 8px
radius.primitive.16 → 16px
radius.primitive.24 → 24px (pill buttons)
shadow.card → 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)
\`\`\`

### SEMANTIC TOKENS (Purpose-based mappings)

\`\`\`
color.background.primary → color.primitive.gray.50
color.background.surface → #FFFFFF
color.action.primary.default → color.primitive.green.500
color.action.primary.pressed → color.primitive.green.600
color.text.primary → color.primitive.gray.900
color.text.secondary → color.primitive.gray.600
color.border.default → color.primitive.gray.200

spacing.card.padding → spacing.primitive.16
spacing.section.gap → spacing.primitive.24
spacing.list.item.gap → spacing.primitive.12
\`\`\`

### ACCESSIBILITY TOKENS

\`\`\`
accessibility.contrast.primary-text-on-surface → 4.8:1
accessibility.contrast.secondary-text-on-surface → 4.5:1
accessibility.tap-target.minimum → 44x44px
accessibility.tap-target.comfortable → 48x48px
\`\`\`

## Output Format

Return ONLY valid JSON:

\`\`\`json
{
  "colors": {
    "primitive": {
      "green-500": "#4CAF50",
      "gray-50": "#F9FAFB"
    },
    "semantic": {
      "action-primary-default": "green-500",
      "background-primary": "gray-50"
    }
  },
  "typography": {
    "sizes": {
      "heading-xl": "28px",
      "body-md": "16px"
    },
    "weights": {
      "bold": "700",
      "regular": "400"
    }
  },
  "spacing": {
    "padding": {
      "card": "16px",
      "section": "24px"
    }
  },
  "layout": {
    "borderRadius": {
      "card": "12px",
      "button": "24px"
    }
  },
  "accessibility": {
    "contrast": {
      "primary-text-on-surface": "4.8:1"
    },
    "tapTargets": {
      "minimum": "44x44px"
    }
  }
}
\`\`\`

## Requirements
- Extract EVERY color you see (backgrounds, text, buttons, borders)
- Measure ALL spacing values (padding, margins, gaps)
- Identify ALL typography sizes and weights
- Calculate contrast ratios for text on backgrounds
- Be precise with measurements (use 4px grid system)
`;

/**
 * Prompt for extracting UI components and their variants
 */
export const COMPONENT_EXTRACTION_PROMPT = `
You are analyzing a UI screenshot to identify reusable components.

## Task
Identify ALL UI components, their variants, states, and composition.

### Component Types to Look For:

1. **Buttons**: Primary, Secondary, Tertiary, Social Login
2. **Cards**: Destination Card, List Item Card
3. **Inputs**: Text Field, Search Bar, Date Picker
4. **Navigation**: Bottom Nav, Tab Bar, Header
5. **Lists**: Destination List, Saved List, Search Results
6. **Modals**: Bottom Sheet, Dialog, Loading Modal
7. **Images**: Hero Image, Thumbnail, Avatar
8. **Icons**: Navigation, Actions, Social, Decorative

### For Each Component Document:

- **Name**: Descriptive component name
- **Type**: Category (button, card, input, etc.)
- **Variants**: Different visual versions (primary/secondary, large/small)
- **States**: Interactive states (default, hover, pressed, disabled, selected)
- **Composition**: What sub-components make it up
- **Tokens Used**: Which design tokens it uses

## Output Format

Return ONLY valid JSON:

\`\`\`json
{
  "components": [
    {
      "name": "Primary Button",
      "type": "button",
      "variants": ["large", "medium"],
      "states": ["default", "pressed", "disabled"],
      "composition": "Text label with 16px horizontal padding, 12px vertical padding, 24px border radius",
      "tokens": [
        "color.action.primary.default",
        "typography.size.body.md",
        "spacing.button.padding",
        "radius.primitive.24"
      ]
    },
    {
      "name": "Destination Card",
      "type": "card",
      "variants": ["with-image", "compact"],
      "states": ["default", "selected"],
      "composition": "Image (full-width) + Title (20px bold) + Subtitle (14px regular) + Bookmark icon",
      "tokens": [
        "spacing.card.padding",
        "radius.card",
        "color.background.surface"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "uxPatterns": [
    {
      "name": "Swipe to Delete",
      "description": "List items can be swiped left to reveal delete action",
      "interaction": "Horizontal swipe gesture",
      "visualFeedback": "Red destructive action revealed"
    }
  ]
}
\`\`\`

## Requirements
- Identify EVERY distinct component
- Document ALL variants you see
- Note ALL interactive states
- Describe UX patterns and interactions
- Map components to design tokens
`;

install_instructions: 3. Add Claude API key to environment
